title: Microwaved (Furnace Reskin)
description: This is not a furnace, it's a microwave! MMMM...
body:
# Still in the Stone Age?
Still eating ~~wonderful~~ home cooked meals from a furnace? This resource pack makes those awful stone blocks turn into a much more modern and ~~classy~~ counterpart. Now it's as easy as popping that freezer burned **raw chicken** in the **Microwave for 10 seconds** and **BOOM** you got some slop to feed on!

## Check out our line up:
### - The Classic Microwave (Furnace):
![The Classic Microwave](https://i.imgur.com/qDq0CgH.jpeg)

### - The Blast Microwave (Blast Furnace):
![The Blast Microwave](https://i.imgur.com/tt35ixO.jpeg)

### - The Air Fryer (Smoker):
![The Air Fryer](https://i.imgur.com/Yv9Hi6V.jpeg)
